title: Wither Reincarnated x epic fight
description: Make Wither Reincarnated work with epic fight
body:
This mod is a compatibility fix that allows Wither: Reincarnated and Epic Fight to work together without crashes.

Normally, when Epic Fight is installed alongside Wither: Reincarnated, attempting to respawn the Wither boss can cause the game to crash due to entity and combat system conflicts.
This mod resolves those issues by properly handling the interaction between both mods, ensuring stable behavior during boss spawning and combat.

Features:

Fixes crashes when respawning the Wither while Epic Fight is installed
Ensures full compatibility between Wither: Reincarnated and Epic Fight
No gameplay changes — only stability and compatibility improvements
Lightweight and safe to add to existing worlds
Required Mods:

Wither: Reincarnated
Epic Fight
If you’re using Epic Fight and want to enjoy the enhanced Wither experience from Wither: Reincarnated without crashes, this mod is for you.
